summary: Iteration 11 RBAC hardening fully verified. Backend: 124/124 pytest passed (108 previous regression + 16 new iter11 super-admin tests). Frontend: All Playwright RBAC assertions pass for both erwin (non-super-admin) and susanto (super-admin).
critical_code_review_comments: deps.py require_super_admin: username comparison is lowercased & stripped on both sides — good. Error detail leaks the super-admin username (SUSANTO uppercased) — acceptable per spec but slight info-disclosure to non-super admins.
SUPER_ADMIN_USERNAME is read at module import; changing env at runtime requires backend restart. Consider making it a request-time lookup or documenting the constraint.
AdminPage deeplink guard: '?tab=users' silently redirects to approvals for non-super admins. Consider a small toast so users understand why they didn't land where they clicked.
Frontend relies on user.is_super_admin from /auth/me — good defence-in-depth since backend also enforces 403. No RBAC-only-on-frontend bugs found.
test_credentials: Re-seeded via /app/backend/seed_data.py. All 5 users (susanto/admin123, erwin/erwin123, staff01/staff123, store01/store123, finance01/finance123) verified via login.
seed_data_creation: Ran /app/backend/seed_data.py before testing to restore staff01/store01/finance01 credentials to match test_credentials.md
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iter11 test file /app/backend/tests/test_iter11.py uses requests.Session (cookie-based auth), not Bearer tokens — /api/auth/login sets HttpOnly cookie 'access_token' and returns user JSON w/ is_super_admin. Run full backend regression with REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL exported (some older iter4 tests import it without a default). Playwright login: fill inputs[0]/[1] with username/password then click 'Masuk' button. dept-admin dropdown behaviour is Radix — click force=True and wait 400ms.
rca_of_issue: N/A — implementation matches spec end-to-end. Only friction encountered: (a) initial test wrote payload for /transactions using old flat 'items' schema (backend now expects single-row invoice_date/item_name/vendor_name); corrected. (b) Old iter4 tests require REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL to be set in shell env (they don't have a default) — export before running full regression.
